surgical-instrument-testing-and-inspecti.comment: "I found the sections on visual inspection and functional testing of surgical instruments the most interesting, especially learning how to identify defects, check alignment, tension, and movement. These practical, real-world examples helped me better understand how proper inspection improves patient safety and the reliability of surgical procedures."
"This is an astounding course for me. Very much engaging and interesting too. Awesome!"
"I like the idea of graphics and real pictures of instruments being displayed. It makes the learning more interesting and eases the absorption of information."
"I learned more about the handling of surgical instruments from a perspective that we as physicians sometimes take for granted, but that is very important for the proper recovery of our patients."

tecsalud-suture-technique.comment: "I found several aspects of this course particularly interesting and valuable. The detailed explanation of different types of sutures helped me understand their specific indications and appropriate uses. The step-by-step demonstration of various suturing techniques, was very helpful in visualizing the practical application. Learning about the selection of sutures based on tissue type and wound condition enhanced my clinical reasoning. Finally, the emphasis on preventing infection and ensuring optimal wound healing through proper technique and suture choice was very insightful for my future medical practice."

"The course was really good and informative. I found it especially interesting during the video about suturing — it was very clear and easy to understand. The demonstration helped me learn the technique step by step, and it kept me engaged throughout. Overall, it's a great learning experience for anyone in the medical field."

"I found the hands-on procedural demonstrations and interactive case discussions the most interesting parts of the course. Seeing surgical techniques applied in real-life scenarios gave me a deeper appreciation of surgical precision and decision-making. I also enjoyed learning about the rationale behind different surgical approaches and the use of specific instruments or sutures in various tissues. It made the theoretical concepts come alive and reinforced the critical thinking required in surgery."
"Overall, the course was very informative and practical. I appreciated the hands-on demonstrations. Adding more real-life scenarios and interactive quizzes could make it even better."

"The most onteresting aspects of the course were the well documented and organized slides in the presentation. They contained accurate information that makes efficient in comprehending the concepts. Thank you!"

"One of the most interesting aspects of this course was learning about different types of sutures and their specific clinical applications. Understanding the differences between absorbable vs. non-absorbable, monofilament vs. multifilament, and knowing when to use each type in various surgical scenarios—such as infected wounds, vascular repair, or subcutaneous closure—was both practical and insightful. These concepts are directly applicable in clinical settings and enhance surgical decision-making skills."

transversus-abdominis-plane-block.comment: "I learned the anatomy of the abdominal wall and the nerve innervation makes it easy to grasp the concept of why we use the blocks and how to adequately perform them."
"I am very grateful for this course. Thank you."
"This course helped me to improve skills and knowledge in regional anaesthesia."
"The type and quality of the information is very adequate."

z-plasty.comment: "I found the interactive simulations and step-by-step decision making, especially performing a Z-plasty virtually from planning to execution to be particularly valuable."
"Great short course, I wish I had known of this app sooner."

wfsa-course-template-admin-only.comment: "Great short course, I wish I had known of this app sooner."
"Great short course, I wish I had known of this app sooner."
